message:
feat(core): add font atlas cache policy and render-prep metrics to simulation framework

Extend the simulation/testing infrastructure with structured types for
font-size transition rendering, enabling deterministic testing and
telemetry capture of font atlas management decisions.

New types:
- FontAtlasCachePolicy enum (ReuseHotAtlas, SelectiveInvalidate,
  FullRebuild) — models the atlas invalidation strategy selected
  during a font-size change event
- FontRenderPrepMetrics struct — captures cache_hit_glyphs,
  glyphs_rebuilt_now, deferred_glyphs, staged_batches_total,
  staged_batches_deferred, shader_warmup flag, and atlas_cache_policy
  for a single font-size transition

Integration:
- Add optional render_prep_metrics field to ResizeTimelineStageSample
  for font-size transition events (skip_serializing_if None)
- Add HashMap to simulation imports for new font atlas tracking
  internals

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
